name: editor4c: inline markdown autoformat (*hi* → italic) fires on the closing delimiter
_note: Phase B — markdown autoformat. onBeforeInput → dispatchIntent → cmdInputRule already runs on every 1-char insertText (src/input/intent.ts), so typing a closing inline delimiter triggers the rule. Clear the first block (Cmd+A + Backspace) to a clean editable block, then type '*hi*'. The final '*' completes /\*([^*]+?)\*$/, wrapping 'hi' in the italic mark and dropping BOTH delimiters — so the block text becomes exactly 'hi' (not '*hi*'). Asserting the delimiter-free text distinguishes a fired rule from a literal insert.
